strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth in recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — a rare required skill
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/limited (robotics work in 2016-2018)
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named; testing tooling depth is demonstrated mostly in the D language ecosystem
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades across web, mobile, and backend systems, and recent roles align directly with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes). The explicit AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq matches a hard-to-find requirement, and a deep testing/craftsmanship background fits the quality expectations. Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and the specific JS testing frameworks are real but minor for someone with this breadth, as they are readily learnable framework-level details rather than skill gaps.
